name: Rigatoni with a Thick Mushroom Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound short tubular pasta (rigatoni, mezze, etc.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sauce: In a large nonstick skillet, melt butter and oil over medium heat.
Shred mushrooms using the largest holes on a grater and add them directly to the skillet.
Add garlic and crushed pepper.
2. Cook for about 10 minutes, or until the liquid from the mushrooms has evaporated.
Then, add broth and bouillon cube. Increase the heat to high and cook for an additional 10-12 minutes,
allowing flavors to blend and the liquid to reduce slightly. Remove from heat, stir in parsley and salt,
and set aside.
3. In a large pot of lightly salted water, bring to a boil and add pasta. Cook until firm-tender (al dente),
then drain well and return the pasta to the pot. Add mushroom sauce and cook over medium heat for 1 minute.
Turn off the heat, stir in cheese, and mix thoroughly. Serve immediately.
